name: O.R.C. Bombardier Beetle
description: The O.R.C. Bombardier Beetle is the siege version of the regular bombardier in Grounded 2. It still dominates fights with acid and hazard zones, but the O.R.C. network makes it much more disciplined and harder to flank.
behavior: It patrols very specific routes in O.R.C. zones and rarely leaves its control lane. Unlike the normal bombardier, it manages its shots much better and times the close spray more deliberately.
interactionWithPlayer: It detects you and turns the floor into an acid trap very quickly. If you try to face-tank it without moving your feet, the safe space vanishes almost immediately.
interactionWithCreatures: It acts as a heavy support piece in O.R.C. waves, forcing other creatures to walk around puddles or eat residual damage.
strategy: Fresh is still the best answer, but positioning wins this fight. Move between shots, avoid getting boxed in by the spray, and punish after longer acid strings end.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 81.25. Close-Range Spray: 75. Ranged Shot: 87.5. 3 Upwards Shot: 87.5.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A heavy bite used to punish anyone who gets too close between acid puddles.

abilities.name: Close-Range Spray
abilities.description: It spits acid at close range to open space and force you backward.

abilities.name: Ranged Shot
abilities.description: It fires a straight acid projectile to control mid-range spacing.

abilities.name: 3 Upwards Shot
abilities.description: It launches several acid shots upward so they rain down and shrink the safe area even more.
